title: Hercules & The Waggoner
content:
When the God saw the Waggoner kneel,
    Crying, "Hercules! Lift me my wheel
    From the mud, where 'tis stuck!"
    He laughed--"No such luck;
    Set your shoulder yourself to the wheel."

    The Gods Help Those Who Help Themselves
meaning:
"Hercules & The Waggoner" is a quintessential example of Walter Crane's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
